positive: A magnificent, symmetrical celestial moth with iridescent, highly detailed wings, surrounded by stylized lunar phases, crystalline botanicals, and blooming ethereal mandalas. The composition is perfectly centered and highly decorative, utilizing a palette of deep midnight blue, glowing turquoise, shimmering gold leaf accents, and emerald green. Graphic illustration style, strong silhouettes, clean vector lines, extreme high contrast, designed to look stunning as a screen-printed fabric design, perfect symmetry, magical realism.
